name: National Fuel Gas Company
description: National Fuel Gas Company is a diversified energy organization headquartered in Western New York that operates an integrated collection of natural gas assets. As one of the earliest gas utility companies in the United States, the company manages operations across four primary business segments: exploration and production, pipeline and storage, gathering, and utility services. Committed to core values of safety, excellence, integrity, and commitment, National Fuel delivers essential energy services to customers while fostering community vitality and promoting sustainable practices throughout its operations in New York and Pennsylvania.
